crawledPages.extractedText: AI Flash Report Daily AI News Roundup - Updated: 2026-05-28 Topics ▼ OpenAI News Google AI News ChatGPT News ChatGPT Updates Machine Learning News Deep Learning News AI Research News AI Startup News AI Industry News AI News Today AI Breakthrough News New AI Model Releases Resources ▼ Model Release Tracker AI Timeline AI Glossary About Contact Archive Artificial Intelligence News at Machine Speed ⚡ AI Stock Market Top 10 AI Companies Live Prices Today's Model Releases Flash NEW AI MODEL RELEASES - May 28, 2026 There are no major frontier‑lab model releases in the last 24–48 hours from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta, Mistral, xAI, Cohere, Stability, Microsoft, or Hugging Face based on public trackers and news as of early UTC. In that case, here are the most recent notable model launches from roughly the past month , which shape the current landscape. --- • GPT‑5.5 Instant by OpenAI — A lightweight, lower‑latency variant of GPT‑5.5 aimed at cheaper, high‑throughput workloads, listed as a recent proprietary release on model‑tracking sites.[4] - Capabilities: General‑purpose chat and coding with GPT‑5.5‑class behavior, optimized for speed and cost (positioned similarly to prior “Turbo” lines, but at the 5.5 generation).[4] - Key specs: Exact parameter count and context window not yet publicly detailed; expected to share the large‑context regime of GPT‑5.5 while trading some peak capability for latency and price (inferred from prior OpenAI “Instant/Turbo” lines).[4] - Availability: API via OpenAI; proprietary, no open weights.[4] • Mistral Medium 3.5 by Mistral AI — An open‑source mid‑sized model that refreshes Mistral’s “Medium” tier, appearing as a new open‑weight release.[4] - Capabilities: Strong general‑purpose reasoning and coding; positioned between smaller “7B‑class” models and large frontier models, with a focus on efficiency and self‑hosting.[4] - Key specs: Exact parameter count not listed on the tracker; typical Mistral “Medium” configurations are in the tens…

crawledPages.title: AI Release Tracker — Every LLM Release Since ChatGPT
crawledPages.extractedText: About AI Release Tracker AI Release Tracker is a free, continuously updated timeline of every major AI model release from the world's leading AI labs. We cover 160 tracked frontier models from Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Meta, xAI, DeepSeek, Mistral, Moonshot AI, Cursor , starting with the launch of ChatGPT on November 30 2022 . Every model page includes release date, parameter count, context window, model type, and benchmark scores (GPQA Diamond, SWE-Bench Verified, MMMU) when published. The analytics page shows cumulative release charts, monthly release frequency, year-over-year totals, benchmark frontier progression, and release cadence by company. Browse by company OpenAI AI models Anthropic AI models Google AI models Meta AI models xAI AI models DeepSeek AI models Mistral AI models Moonshot AI AI models Cursor AI models Frequently asked questions What is AI Release Tracker? AI Release Tracker is a free, continuously updated timeline of every major AI model release from the world's leading AI labs. It currently tracks 160 models from 9 companies — including OpenAI, Anthropic, Google DeepMind, Meta, xAI, DeepSeek, Mistral, Moonshot AI, and Cursor — from the launch of ChatGPT on November 30 2022 through today. What is the latest AI model release? The most recently tracked frontier model is Claude Opus 4.8 by Anthropic, released on May 28 2026. See the live homepage for the up-to-the-minute timeline. Which AI model has the highest benchmark scores? On GPQA Diamond (graduate-level science reasoning), the current leader is GPT-5.4-Pro by OpenAI with a score of 94.4%. On SWE-Bench Verified (real-world software engineering), the current leader is Claude Opus 4.7 by Anthropic with a score of 87.6%. Both benchmarks are tracked live on the Analytics page. Which companies are tracked on AI Release Tracker? AI Release Tracker covers releases from Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Meta, xAI, DeepSeek, Mistral, Moonshot AI, Cursor.

Every model page includes release date, parameter count, context window, model type, and benchmark scores (GPQA Diamond, SWE-Bench Verified, MMMU) when published.

AI Release Tracker is a free, continuously updated timeline of every major AI model release from the world's leading AI labs.

It currently tracks 160 models from 9 companies — including OpenAI, Anthropic, Google DeepMind, Meta, xAI, DeepSeek, Mistral, Moonshot AI, and Cursor — from the launch of ChatGPT on November 30 2022 through today.
The most recently tracked frontier model is Claude Opus 4.8 by Anthropic, released on May 28 2026.
On GPQA Diamond (graduate-level science reasoning), the current leader is GPT-5.4-Pro by OpenAI with a score of 94.4%.
On SWE-Bench Verified (real-world software engineering), the current leader is Claude Opus 4.7 by Anthropic with a score of 87.6%.
Which companies are tracked on AI Release Tracker?
